title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Nocil South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Nocil South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Nocil South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nocil South Asia Partners:
Nocil South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil South Asia Partners!
